role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and remained silent in Phase 2.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation types, and climate indicators.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant morphology (sclerophyllous, bark, canopy) to identify Eucalyptus.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, shoulder composition, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Leveraged Google Street View camera artifacts (hood color, blur) and cross-domain synthesis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country as Australia. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing strong visual evidence (Eucalyptus morphology, road shoulders, camera artifacts) that led to a decisive victory in the tournament.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted the lack of text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and dry grass match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of Eucalyptus trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the narrow road and gravel shoulders match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the camera hood and blur match the image.
